Name: update_user_departments
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "public"."user_departments" SET "role" = $1::text WHERE user_departments."department_id" = $2::uuid AND (user_departments."department_id" = ANY($3::uuid[])) RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."user_id" AS "user_id", mutation_result."department_id" AS "department_id", mutation_result."role" AS "role" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
